title: Elemental Effects Badges (EleBadges) [Cobblemon Addon]
description: A mod that adds equippable Type Badges with Effects to Cobblemon.
body:
This mod adds **equippable Type Badges** with a variety of **Effects** to Cobblemon. 

Each Effect gives a different boost to the player - some are vanilla Minecraft effects and some are new effects. Each Effect has four tiers based on how many Badges of the type are owned by the player, with a total of 72 Badges based on the games (and a few original ones), with 3-4 badges for each type. Textures WIP.

Assets Credits: [Dakinquelia](https://www.deviantart.com/dakinquelia/art/Pokemon-Badges-482957254) and [ProfessorMorDBG](https://www.deviantart.com/professormordbg/art/Paldea-Badges-demake-large-1142694862) on DeviantArt. 

Added effects include: 

**Water**: Increase swimming speed and oxygen levels while swimming.

**Fire** : Reduce time taken while burning.

**Ghost** : Increased resistance to knockback and movement efficiency on different terrains, and Invisibility.

**Psychic** : Increased reach for block interaction and entity interaction.

**Steel** : Armor and Toughness Boosts.

**Rock** : Step Height Boosts.

**Dark** : Sneaking Speed boosts and Night Vision.

**Bug** : Inflict Weaving on targets.

**Poison** : Inflict Poison and Wither on targets.


**(Older Versions Only - Badge Effects)**

The name, effect and identifier (for datapacks) for each Badge is given below. Currently, badges are only obtainable via commands or Creative Mode.

**Identifier**: elebadges:rock_badge_1  
**Effect**: Step Height Boost I
